scores.one_line_justification: Correct comparison-key-only normalisation with R7/R8 intact and faithful R3 spec update, but no CR/plan artefact despite the workspace's sdlc-studio process instruction - judgement calls live only in docstrings.

Correct minimal change, faithful R3 rewording, honest docstrings, and a complete CR with verified ACs; tests cover case, whitespace, R7 and verbatim storage, lacking only an explicit combined-case+whitespace and internal-whitespace boundary.

Same correct behaviour with a small normalise_email helper; R3 spec text usefully cross-references R8, mutation test checks both stored and candidate records, and the CR records scope and verified ACs.

Correct key-only normalisation, minimal faithful R3 update, non-mutation test asserts stored and candidate verbatim, and a complete CR with verified ACs; missing only explicit combined and internal-whitespace boundary tests.

Strongest suite of the five: adds the reported combined case+whitespace case and an internal-whitespace boundary test on top of R7/R8 pins; correct change, R3 updated with an R7 cross-reference, CR records proposed changes and impact.
